narrative:
Westerville 4-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,176 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
